name: Atlantic Express Si Bus Co
officers: Dominic Gatto (President, Atlantic Express Inc per BBB)
registry_source: BBB profile / Wikipedia; NY DOS Corporation database not directly verifiable
notes: Atlantic Express was a Staten Island-based school/transit bus operator founded 1964; declared Chapter 11 bankruptcy in late 2013 and operating rights acquired by Academy Bus Lines. 260 Meredith Ave is actually the MTA Meredith Avenue Bus Depot (NYC Transit), not an Atlantic Express address; depot operations ceased Jan 3, 2025. Could not find a SAFER carrier record specifically named 'Atlantic Express SI Bus Co'. Possibly related historical entity: Atlantic Express Coachways Inc (USDOT 385868, 7 North St, Staten Island NY 10302). BBB-reported Atlantic Express Inc address was 7 North St; business believed out of business (mail returned 11/2/2016).

name: Gross School Bus Svc Inc
carrier_operation: Intrastate / school bus (Not Authorized for interstate for-hire)
registry_source: PA Dept of State Business Corporation #148533 (per pennsylvaniadb.com); D&B / Manta confirm
notes: Strong match on name, city and address. Founded 1968 by William Gross after acquiring contract for Owen J Roberts School District in 1965. Operates as G&L Student Transportation DBA. SAFER snapshot pulled 06/03/2026: 7 power units, 11 drivers, school-bus carrier. Active PA business corp.

name: Bay Parkway Bus Mntnc Inc
officers: Athena Antonoff (owner, Careful Bus Service Inc)
entity_status: unknown (separate Bay Parkway Bus Maintenance Inc entity not located in public registries)
registry_source: NY DOS / OpenGovNY not directly returning a 'Bay Parkway Bus Maintenance Inc' record; Careful Bus Service Inc co-located at same address per FMCSA & company website
notes: No SAFER record specifically titled 'Bay Parkway Bus Maintenance Inc'. The operating school-bus carrier at 5015 Bay Parkway is Careful Bus Service Inc (USDOT 1858852); Bay Parkway Bus Maintenance Inc is likely a sister/maintenance affiliate or holding entity (NYC OPT vendor lists frequently use such structures). FMCSA fields shown reflect Careful Bus Service Inc (USDOT 1858852, 83 power units, 102 drivers, active, intrastate-only school bus, no safety rating, one injury crash in trailing 24 months, registered Feb 2009). Family-owned >40 years per company site; founder Hy Antonoff. Confidence medium because identity link is by address, not by exact legal name.

name: Boro Crescent Corp
inc_date: unknown (BBB file opened 2018-02-14; corporation predates BBB file)
entity_status: active (per BBB listing as bus rental business)
registry_source: BBB business profile (Brooklyn NY); listed on Bizapedia though paywalled; NY DOS DOS-ID not surfaced in search
notes: No SAFER/FMCSA record found under 'BORO CRESCENT CORP', 'BORO CRESCENT', or 'BOROCRESCENT'. Likely intrastate-only NY school/charter bus operator below federal interstate registration requirement (charter bus rental). Address 2900 Shell Rd, Brooklyn NY 11224-3611 confirmed via BBB and superpages. Related/co-located entity Borocrescent Transit Ltd is at 2906 Shell Rd. Same 2900 Shell Rd compound hosts multiple bus operators including Meyer Transit Corp, Deville Bus Co (USDOT 2199814) and DLE Bus Svc Inc (rank 445). NY DOS Corporation search not yielding direct entity ID via public web; recommend manual DOS lookup at apps.dos.ny.gov.
